chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5881 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "ثَلاَثٌ أَخَافُهُنَّ عَلَى أُمَّتِي مِنْ بَعْدِي اَلضَّلاَلَةُ بَعْدَ اَلْهُدَى وَ مَضَلاَّتُ اَلْفِتَنِ وَ شَهْوَةُ اَلْبَطْنِ وَ اَلْفَرْجِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5881 - In the narration of Ismail ibn Muslim, the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Three things I fear for my nation after me: deviation after guidance, misleading temptations, and the desires of the stomach and the private parts."
